critical.mandate: Use sprint state machine: backlog, validating, ready-for-dev, in-progress, blocked, review, done

step.title: Load Epics and Stories
step.action: Parse all stories with their priorities, sizes, dependencies

step.title: Story Selection
step.action: Select stories for this sprint based on priority and dependencies
Ensure total size fits within velocity estimate
Respect dependency ordering — blocked stories cannot be selected without their blockers
If {test_artifacts}/test-plan.md exists: apply risk levels to story selection — buffer 20% for high-risk stories in velocity estimate
Flag any high-risk story that does not have a corresponding {test_artifacts}/atdd-{story_key}.md file — add a sprint risk note

step.title: Optional: Mobile Testing
step.ask: Would you like to create a mobile test plan? /gaia-mobile-testing will define the device matrix, configure Appium infrastructure, set up React Native testing patterns, and design responsive viewport tests. Recommended for mobile or responsive applications. (yes/no)
step.action: If no: skip — mobile testing can be run anytime later with /gaia-mobile-testing

step.title: Sprint Plan Generation
step.action: Create sprint plan with story assignments and execution order

step.title: Status Initialization
step.action: Set all selected stories to 'backlog' status
Generate sprint-status.yaml with format: sprint_id: "sprint-{N}" started: "{date}" stories: - key: "{story-key}" status: "backlog" assignee: null blocked_by: null updated: "{date}"

step.title: Generate Output
step.template-output: Generate sprint plan document with: sprint goals, selected stories (ordered), velocity target, risk assessment, and a Testing Readiness section listing high-risk stories, ATDD file status for each, and any missing test artifacts.
